operating_ranges.evidence: Total condensation flow: f3 = f1 - f2 = 8.0 - 0.4 = 7.6 g/s ≈ 27.4 kg/hour
f2 = amount of air remaining in compressed air after drying (saturated condition at +6°C) f2 = 1×0.007246×445/8 = 0.4g/s
Minimum air inlet temperature: 0 celsius, Max. cooling water outlet temperature: 50 celsius

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Discharge flexible clogged. → Check and correct as necessary
Float valve malfunctioning. → Remove float valve assembly, clean and check

fault_conditions.name: condensate_not_discharged_during_loading
fault_conditions.description: Condensate is not discharged from condensate trap during loading
fault_conditions.symptoms: No condensate drainage during compressor loading operation
fault_conditions.evidence: Condensate is not discharged from condensate trap during loading

fault_conditions.name: discharge_flexible_clogged
fault_conditions.description: Discharge flexible is blocked preventing condensate drainage
fault_conditions.symptoms: No condensate flow through discharge line
fault_conditions.evidence: Discharge flexible clogged. → Check and correct as necessary

fault_conditions.name: float_valve_malfunction
fault_conditions.description: Float valve assembly not operating correctly
fault_conditions.evidence: Float valve malfunctioning. → Remove float valve assembly, clean and check

maintenance_actions.name: check_discharge_flexible
maintenance_actions.evidence: Discharge flexible clogged. → Check and correct as necessary

maintenance_actions.name: clean_float_valve_assembly
maintenance_actions.evidence: Remove float valve assembly, clean and check

assumptions.statement: Condensate trap operates at system pressure conditions
assumptions.reason: Manual shows condensate calculations based on compressed air conditions but does not specify separate trap operating pressure

assumptions.statement: Condensate trap handles water condensation from compression process
assumptions.reason: Manual describes condensate formation during compression and need for drainage but does not detail trap-specific mechanisms
